instruction: Write an email to the sales director summarizing Q3 performance across the three product lines.

constraints.framing: lead with the overall result, then the per-line detail

feedback_rounds: Please name the strongest and weakest line explicitly, and add the total Q3 2025 revenue across all lines.
rationale_hint: Three required figures + framing; feedback adds total (2,530,000) and strongest/weakest naming.

provenance.source_benchmark: WONDERBREAD SOP Generation / SOP Improvement (Wornow et al., 2024); TheAgentCompany report drafting (Xu et al., 2024)
provenance.adaptation: Author-constructed table, brief, and constraints over synthetic figures; data-to-text drafting with scripted feedback follows the SOP-generation/improvement and report-drafting pattern of the cited benchmarks. No benchmark text or data is reproduced. Sub-class: summary_email.
provenance.license: Original work by the author (tables, briefs, constraints, judge rubric); benchmark semantics reference only
